processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'Cogtgtdddk', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @fields nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int declare @startYear int select @startYear = nam_bd from dmstt select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end -- Check if @type = '0' delete @@table where ma_sp + ma_bp + rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) + ma_yt in (select ma_sp + ma_bp + rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) + ma_yt from xcdytdd) select @field = 'ma_yt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_yt <> '' and ma_yt not in (select ma_yt from xdmyt)&Error; select @field = 'ma_sp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_sp <> '' and ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from dmvt where loai_vt='51')&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)&Error; select @field = 'so_lsx', @r = min(stt) from @@table where so_lsx <> '' and rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) not in (select rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) from phlsx)&Error; select a.* into #k from @@table a join (select * from xcdytdd where ky=0 and nam = @startYear) b on a.ma_yt = b.ma_yt and a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and rtrim(ltrim(a.so_lsx)) = rtrim(ltrim(b.so_lsx)) delete @@table where ma_yt + ma_sp + ma_bp + rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) in (select ma_yt + ma_sp + ma_bp + rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) from #k) -- Insert select @q = 'insert into xcdytdd(ky, nam, ma_yt, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, dd_ck) ' select @q = @q + ' select 0, ' + str(@startYear) + ', ma_yt, ma_sp, ma_bp, rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)), dd_ck from @@table' exec sp_executesql @q if @type = '1' begin update xcdytdd set dd_ck = b.dd_ck from xcdytdd a left join #k b on rtrim(ltrim(a.ma_yt)) = rtrim(ltrim(b.ma_yt)) and rtrim(ltrim(a.ma_sp)) = rtrim(ltrim(b.ma_sp)) and rtrim(ltrim(a.ma_bp)) = rtrim(ltrim(b.ma_bp)) and rtrim(ltrim(a.so_lsx)) = rtrim(ltrim(b.so_lsx)) where rtrim(ltrim(a.ma_yt)) + rtrim(ltrim(a.ma_sp)) + rtrim(ltrim(a.ma_bp)) + rtrim(ltrim(a.so_lsx)) in (select rtrim(ltrim(ma_yt)) + rtrim(ltrim(ma_sp)) + rtrim(ltrim(ma_bp)) + rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) from #k) and a.nam=@startYear and a.ky=0 end
